basic_details.job_title: WCD Odisha Anganwadi Worker Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Women and Child Development Department (WCD Odisha) Anganwadi Worker Notification 2026 has been released under Advt No. 4790/WCD on the official website of WCD Odisha. A total of 2 vacancy has been announced through the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Worker Recruitment 2026.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 18-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of WCD Odisha to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the WCD Odisha Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the WCD Odisha Recruitment 2026 is 18th June 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Anganwadi Worker posts?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy announced for the Anganwadi Worker and Anganwadi Helper positions in the WCD Odisha Recruitment 2026. This is a significant opportunity for eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for WCD Odisha Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for the WCD Odisha Recruitment 2026 is entirely online. Candidates are required to submit their applications through the official portal before the closing date.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for WCD Odisha Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category of candidates applying for the WCD Odisha Recruitment 2026. This makes the application process accessible to all eligible individuals.

faq.question: Q5. What is the job type for the Anganwadi Worker and Anganwadi Helper posts?
faq.answer: The positions of Anganwadi Worker and Anganwadi Helper under the WCD Odisha Recruitment 2026 are on a contractual basis. This offers a defined period of employment.

faq.question: Q6. Where can I find the official notification for WCD Odisha Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification for the WCD Odisha Recruitment 2026 can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page. It contains comprehensive details about the recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the official website for WCD Odisha?
faq.answer: The official website for the Women and Child Development Department, Odisha, is http://engagement-awc.odisha.gov.in. You can find further information and updates here.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for the WCD Odisha Recruitment 2026 is 4790/WCD. This number is important for reference purposes when applying.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from outside Odisha apply for these posts?
faq.answer: The recruitment is specifically for candidates in Odisha. Eligibility criteria, including residency, should be carefully checked in the official notification.
